Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So, you're Fuuka Yamagishi-kun, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Relax, there's no need to be nervous. Go on and have a seat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I just want to quickly mention that everyone did an excellent job uncovering the truth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I've heard that all three girls have regained consciousness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}From what I understand, they each came to the school around midnight and waited for the security guard to leave.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Then, once the Dark Hour began, they were attacked by Shadows near the gate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 1 25 25}Because of the situation's similarities to an old ghost story, rumors naturally spread quickly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I knew right from the beginning that it wasn't a ghost.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}What? Where'd you get that from? You were the victim in all this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}But all of those rumors started because I was absent for so long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}That's totally not your fault.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I don't think we could have won that fight if you hadn't been there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}You saved our lives. That's not something just anyone could've done. Take pride in that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}You have a special power that you can use to help others.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}And right now, our group absolutely needs your abilities. Can we count on you to help us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Are you asking me to join you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I think you'd make a good addition to the team, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}You know, we're not trying to pressure you, so if you need some time to think about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}If you do join, you'll have to move into the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}That's fine. I'd rather live here than at home anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Thank you. We really appreciate this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}We'll have the school talk to your parents to resolve any issues.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Wait a minute. Aren't we dragging her into this a bit fast?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}One other topic I'd like to discuss is those special Shadows. We had another encounter this month.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}While we still don't know where they're coming from, I do believe Sanada-kun is right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}They seem to appear alongside the full moon. This, at least, will help us plan for the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}So... the next full moon is showtime, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Knowing when to expect them is a big advantage for us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Now, on the day of the fight, we'll be ready to get in the ring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We figured out the pattern for[n]when special Shadows appear...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Is this what the mysterious[n]boy was trying to tell me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should start paying attention[n]to the moon's phases...[n]{f 1 1}
